title: Signal in Noise
story: [Meridian-7 Log #002] Signal volume has increased. The data stream is a mix of text and numbers, but you notice a pattern: all lines containing digits originate from the same source. Numbers seem to be the foundational structure of rEx's communication — filter them from the noise.
promptChallenge: Write a prompt to have AI generate a regex that matches lines containing at least one digit
hints: [Hint] Regex has a shorthand for matching digits
[Hint] You just need the line to "contain" a digit
promptHints: Tell the AI you want to match lines "containing digits"
Use "at least one digit" to describe the condition
No need to describe the entire line format, just the presence of digits

feedback.onPass: [Data Filtered] Numbers are the skeleton of rEx's language. You're starting to see the texture of the signal.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] Signal filtering failed. Did your rules miss some data lines?
feedback.onPerfect: [Zero-Noise Filter] Perfect. Your filter didn't miss a single valid data packet.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] Manual noise filtering. Impressive efficiency.
